function pb(pc) local pd=pc[2];if pd>pc[3] then pc[(2+2)]=true;return 0;end;pc[2]=pd+1;return bh[3][13][3](pc[1],pd);end;local function pe(pf) local pg=1;local ph=0;while true do local then pk[(1+3)]=true;pk[2]=pk[3]+1;return"";end;pk[2]=pm+pl;return f(pk[1],pm,pm+pl-1);end;local function pn(po) local pp=1;for pq=1,#po do pp=(pp+bh[3][13][3](po,pq)*(((pq-1)%(1+250))+1))%(2147486781-(1586+1548));end;return pp;end;local function pr(ps,pt,pu,pv) local pw=ps;for px=pu-1,0,-1 do local return{qb,1,#qb,0,0,false};end;local function qc(qd) if qd[((14-4)-5)]==0 then if qd[2]>qd[3] then qd[((2+10)-(7-1))]=true;return 0;end;qd[(1+3)]=bh[3][((32-16)-3)][3](qd[1],qd[2]);qd[2]=qd[2]+1;qd[(3+2)]=bh[3][((29+14)-15)][(3+2)];end;local qr=qr+qq;end;qq=qq*2;end;qj[qo]=qp*qn+qr;end;return qj;end;local function qt(qu,qv) local qw=qu;while qw~=nil and not qw[0] do local qx=qc(qv)+1;qw=qw[qx];end;if qw==nil then return 0;end;return qw[1];end;local function qy(qz) local ra=pe(qz);local rb=0;local rc={};for rd=1,ra do local re=pb(qz);local rf=pb(qz);local rg=rc[rf];if rg==nil then rg={};rc[rf]=rg;end;rg[#rg+1]=re;if rf>rb then rb=rf;end;end;local rh={};local ri=0;local rj=0;for rk=1,rb do local rl=rc[rk];if rl~=nil then y(rl);if rk>rj then ri=bh[(110-50)](ri,rk-rj);rj=rk;end;for rm=1,#rl do pr(rh,ri,rk,rl[rm]);ri=ri+1;end;end;end;return rh;end;local function rn(ro,rp,rq) if rp==1 then return bh[(34+28)](ro,bh[3][13][2]);end;if ro>=rq then return rq-1;end;return ro;end;local function rr(rs,rt,ru) if rt==0 or rs==0 then return"";end;if rs==1 then if #ru~=rt then return nil;end;return ru;end;if rs==2 then local rv=oz(ru);local rw=0;local rx=1;local ry={};while rw<rt do local rz=pb(rv);local sa=pe(rv);if rw+sa>rt then return nil;end;ry[rx]=l(oo[rz+1],sa);rx=rx+1;rw=rw+sa;end;return m(ry);end;if rs==bh[3][((6+15)-(10-2))][2] then local sb=oz(ru);local sc={};local sd=1;while sd<=rt do local se=pe(sb);if se==0 then local sf=pe(sb);if sd+sf-1>rt then return nil;end;for sg=1,sf do sc[sd]=oo[1];sd=sd+1;end;else sc[sd]=oo[se];sd=sd+1;end;end;return m(sc);end;if si[sj]==nil then return nil;end;end;local so=oz(si[1]);local sp=oz(si[2]);local sq=oz(si[3]);local sr=1;local ss={};while sr<=rt do local st=pb(so);if st==0 then local su=pe(sq)+2;if sr+su-1>rt then
